tinker.name: Markdown Editor
tinker.description: Markdown editor with live preview and split view

zh-CN.name: Markdown 编辑
zh-CN.description: Markdown 编辑器，支持实时预览和分栏视图

open.description: Open a Markdown file in the editor. Same as opening a file in the UI. Call this before editing an existing file.

path.description: Absolute path to a Markdown file

get.description: Get the current Markdown content in the editor, view mode, line count, file path, and unsaved-change state.

set.description: Replace the Markdown content in the editor. Changes apply immediately. Call save afterward to write to disk.

save.description: Save the current Markdown content to disk. Uses the open file path by default. When no file is open, path is required.

path.description: Absolute path to save to. Required when no file is open; optional to save-as to a new path.
